top_signals.title: MiniMax Joins China AI Fundraising Rush With $2 Billion Deal
top_signals.summary: MiniMax Group Inc. is joining a rush by Chinese technology companies to tap markets for funding aimed at the artificial intelligence buildout, looking to raise as much as $2 billion from selling new shares and convertible bonds.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: U.S. commercial crude oil inventories have decreased in June
top_signals.summary: For the week ending June 19, 2026, U.S. refineries processed 17.1 million barrels per day (b/d) of crude oil, down 81,000 b/d from the previous week, and they operated at 96.1% capacity utilization. Gasoline production averaged 9.5 million b/d, and distillate production increased to 5.2 million b/d.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Mixed signals, research findings, and policy judgements − speech by Catherine L. Mann
top_signals.summary: Given at the Natixis CIB Private Debt Forum

top_signals.title: Corporate report: Financial Ombudsman Service Annual Report 2025 to 2026
top_signals.summary: The annual report and accounts for the Financial Ombudsman Service for 2025-26.

top_signals.title: U.S. refining capacity decreased during 2025
top_signals.summary: U.S. operable atmospheric distillation capacity, the primary measure of refinery capacity, totaled 18.2 million barrels per calendar day (b/cd) on January 1, 2026-down over 250,000 b/cd (about 1%) compared with January 1, 2025-according to our latest annual Refinery Capacity Report.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Coinbase Chief Legal Officer Paul Grewal steps down, remains in advisory role
top_signals.summary: Coinbase Chief Legal Officer Paul Grewal joined the firm in mid-2020 to lead its legal, compliance and government relations operations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
